title: Has Strategy’s capital overhaul put an end to ‘death spiral’ fears?
summary: Strategy's latest plan includes MSTR and STRC buybacks, expanded cash reserves and even potential Bitcoin sales. Will it be enough to defuse the overheated “death spiral” fears?

title: Bitcoin just $5K away from ‘best investment opportunity’ of bear market
summary: Bitcoin's recent selloff brought it within 10% of its realized price — a line that has marked the bottoming zone in Bitcoin's previous bear markets.

title: Alcoa Bets on Aluminum Boom With $5.6 Billion South32 Deal
summary: Alcoa Corp. has agreed to buy South32 Ltd.’s bauxite, alumina and aluminum assets in Australia, Brazil and South Africa in a deal valued at as much as $5.6 billion, cementing its position among the world’s largest aluminum producers as long-term demand strengthens.

title: Trump Reports at Least $1.4 Billion in 2025 Crypto Earnings
summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.

title: Anchorage Digital and Binance Launch Off-Exchange Settlement for Institutional Crypto Trading

title: Trump Discloses Over $1.2 Billion in Crypto Earnings, $50M in Bitcoin Holdings

title: Binance, Changpeng Zhao Sued for $200M by British Investors: Reuters
summary: Crypto exchange Binance and its founder were sued for nearly $200 million in a new lawsuit filed in the United Kingdom.

title: President Trump’s financial disclosures show hundreds of millions in crypto-related income
summary: Trump disclosed over $65 million from equity sales and $236 million in World Liberty token proceeds.

title: ENS co-founder Nick Johnson blocks Security Council renewal with 80% of votes
